title: Test input validation rejects malicious input
description: Verifies bridge and GUI reject path traversal and injection attempts
command: python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, 'tower/addons/bridge'); from tower_run_with_addons import _validate_card_id; assert not _validate_card_id('../../../etc/passwd'), 'Should reject path traversal'; assert not _validate_card_id('card; rm -rf /'), 'Should reject command injection'; print('Input validation working correctly')"
